summary: Tested Phase 2 Direction Module - Plan Chambres & Répartition views for FLOWTYM Housekeeping. All features working correctly: Plan Chambres with status counters, floor accordions, room chips, search, and detail modal. Répartition with stats cards, staff dropzones, and auto-assign button (disabled when all rooms assigned). All data-testid attributes present and functional.
passed_tests: Plan Chambres: Status counters displayed (11 Propre, 7 À nettoyer, 1 En cours, 5 Occupée, 16 Inspection, 0 H.S.)
Plan Chambres: Vue par étage with 4 floors (Étage 1-4), each showing 10 chambres with mini-stats
Plan Chambres: Floor accordion collapse/expand working correctly
Plan Chambres: Room chips colored by status (green=Propre, red=À nettoyer, yellow=En cours, blue=Occupée, purple=Inspection)
Plan Chambres: Search functionality working - searching '201' filters to show only room 201
Plan Chambres: Room detail modal opens on chip click showing type, étage, assignation, historique
Plan Chambres: data-testid='room-chip-{numero}' present on all 40 room chips
Répartition: Stats cards displayed (19 TOTAL, 0 EN ATTENTE, 19 ASSIGNÉES, 8 DÉPARTS, 11 RECOUCHES)
Répartition: Équipe du jour showing 4 employés with workload (chambres count, time estimate)
Répartition: Staff cards showing assigned rooms with D/R badges (Départ/Recouche)
Répartition: Progress bars showing workload per employee
Répartition: 'Toutes les chambres sont assignées' message when 0 unassigned rooms
Répartition: Répartition auto button correctly disabled when no unassigned rooms
Répartition: data-testid='staff-dropzone-{id}' present on all 4 staff cards
seed_data_creation: Existing data used: 40 rooms across 4 floors, 4 housekeeping staff, 19 cleaning tasks (8 départs, 11 recouches)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Direction Module fully tested. Plan Chambres view shows rooms by floor with status counters, search, and detail modal. Répartition view shows staff assignments with drag & drop zones (currently all rooms assigned so draggable-room elements are 0). All data-testid attributes verified: tab-plan-chambres, tab-repartition, room-chip-{numero}, staff-dropzone-{id}, draggable-room-{numero}, plan-chambres-view, repartition-view.
